data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for integration with payroll systems.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the integration with payroll systems, but the provided evidence does not include any API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this functionality is implemented or operational. While the linked use case mentions the need for integration with payroll systems, there are no concrete examples or evidence demonstrating that this feature has been tested or validated in the current saga run. Therefore, the validation cannot be conclusively assessed.
gaps: No evidence of integration with payroll systems functionality being tested or validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the payroll integration requirement.
